action.description: The committee on HLT recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 8 Ayes: Representative(s) Takayama, Keohokapu-Lee Loy, Marten, Olds, Takenouchi, Alcos; Ayes with reservations: Representative(s) Hartsfield, Garcia; 1 Noes: Representative(s) Amato; and  Excused: none.
